creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #12)
Well, yes... the code is invalid because the prototype and the old-style (K&R) definition do not match, but are we to go out and fix each and every third-party package to standards-conforming code if our compiler appears to already do the right thing in spite of the discrepancy?

Feel free to provide patches that convert these functions where the *definitions* use char/short/float-sized types to int/int/double respectively, I'll review them, but I'll not write or improve on them.
